purpose: Run a bounded current-model extension while replacing the former zero-regression rule with an expected-utility gate that still rejects contract failures and gross rewrites.

stages.decision: Complete the repeat unless the response contract becomes unreachable, a token limit is reached, or an accepted output exceeds the 30 percent normalized word-edit boundary.

Advance candidates with at least five percent aggregate relative WER reduction and more improved than regressed sections; evaluate the same requirements over both repeats and independently in repeat two.

evaluation_policy.rationale: The product preserves raw transcripts and can make enhancement optional. A small regression count is acceptable when aggregate restoration is materially positive, but dates, numbers, names, negation, and technical terms still require severity review.

irreversible_early_stop.mechanical: Stop once accepted requests plus every remaining request in the active gate cannot reach its minimum.
irreversible_early_stop.token_limit: Stop after the first token-limit failure.
irreversible_early_stop.gross_edit: Stop after the first mechanically accepted target above the 30 percent normalized word-edit boundary.
irreversible_early_stop.correct_input_regression: Record and continue; inspect severity after the full repeat.

cost_policy.conservative_input_accounting: Count each rendered Unicode code point as one input token for the hard planning envelope; this deliberately overstates normal tokenizer usage.

decision_rule: Only repeat-one candidates with at least five percent aggregate relative WER reduction, more improved than regressed sections, and no hard contract or gross-edit failure receive repeat two. Product documentation may expose only models that remain materially positive after both repeats and pass a separate semantic regression review; language-specific results remain visible even when the global result passes.
claim_limit: This is a selected synthetic development challenge. It compares postprocessing candidates but cannot estimate product quality, rank raw STT engines, or replace held-out human professional-audio evidence.
